main.node: FIN-04 Recheck conflito antes de criar

nodes.name: FIN-04 Recheck conflito antes de criar

parameters.query: query FindFin04ByTemplate($pipeId: ID!, $fieldId: String!, $templateId: String!, $first: Int!) { findCards(pipeId: $pipeId, first: $first, search: { fieldId: $fieldId, fieldValue: $templateId }) { edges { node { id fields { field { id label type } value report_value array_value } } } pageInfo { hasNextPage endCursor } } }
mutation CreateFin04($input: CreateCardInput!) { createCard(input: $input) { card { id url } } }
